title: silky jammy uruguayan tofu dumplings
description: cozy dish featuring tofu dumplings with a sweet and tangy sauce, free from refined sugar
instructions: mix tofu with flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl
knead dough for 5 minutes until smooth
cover dough with plastic wrap and rest for 10 minutes
divide dough into 6 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat
fry dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown
transfer dumplings to a baking sheet and bake at 180c for 10 minutes
mix brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, and lemon juice in a saucepan over low heat
cook sauce for 5 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened
serve dumplings with warm sauce drizzled on top
